title: Kairos Education | Elite College Consulting
metaDescription: Independent college counseling for ambitious students worldwide. Harvard, Yale, Stanford and top universities. Real results, not templates — 1-on-1 with Ron Kim.
scarcity: Kairos works with a limited number of families each year.◆A few places remain for the current cycle.

hero.h1: Your child has one shot at the Ivy League. Give it the counselor it deserves.
hero.lead: Kairos is boutique admissions consulting for families targeting Harvard, Yale, and the world's most selective universities. From the first call to the final essay, your child works directly with Ron Kim — Kairos's founder, a former Crimson consultant whose students earn Ivy League admission. Never a junior associate, never a rotating team. At the big firms, your child is one file among thousands; here, they are the only student in the room.
hero.authority: Kairos students have been admitted to

worries.title: Does this sound like your family?
worries.lead: Most parents who come to Kairos are carrying one of these worries. Naming it is the first step to fixing it.

items.title: Strong grades, but is it enough?
items.desc: Your child has the GPA and the scores. So do thousands of other applicants. Numbers get an application read, not admitted.

items.title: A long activities list with no through-line.
items.desc: There is plenty on the resume, but nothing that adds up to a single story an admissions officer remembers.

items.title: The essay feels impossible to start.
items.desc: Your child is talented, but getting that onto the page in their own voice is where almost everyone freezes.

items.title: A big firm already let you down.
items.desc: You paid for a brand and got handed to a junior associate who gave you information, not a plan.

worries.foot: We have sat with every one of these. The fix is never more effort. It is the right strategy, built around your child.

proof.title: A track record, not a promise.
proof.sub: Boutique scale, with outcomes families recognize.
proof.note: Results vary by student, depending on starting point, timeline, target schools, and the work the student puts in. Past admissions do not guarantee future outcomes.

results.title: Where Kairos students get in.
results.sub: Kairos students come from Korea, Singapore, the US, the UK, Jordan, Ethiopia, and beyond, and they earn places at the universities parents hope for and rarely say out loud.

process.title: How it works.
process.lead: A clear path from where your child is now to the acceptance letter. Every step is with Ron, in order, with nothing left to the last minute.

steps.title: Assessment & positioning
steps.desc: Ron starts by understanding your child honestly: their record, their strengths, and what genuinely sets them apart. This becomes the foundation everything else is built on.

steps.title: The strategy roadmap
steps.desc: A year-by-year plan across courses, activities, testing, and the application timeline, sequenced so the work is paced and deliberate.

steps.title: Building a standout profile
steps.desc: Ron guides the research, leadership, and projects that turn a strong student into a memorable applicant, not just a longer list.

steps.title: School list & application strategy
steps.desc: The right schools and the right rounds. Early decision, early action, and regular, chosen around your child's real chances.

steps.title: Essays & interviews
steps.desc: Your child writes; Ron coaches and refines until every essay sounds like them at their best, then prepares them to walk into any interview calm.

testimonials.title: What families say.

items.quote: We came to Ron the summer before senior year, anxious and behind. He treated our son like the only student he had. The essays sounded like our boy, and the acceptance still feels unreal.
We had spoken to a large firm first and felt like a number. With Ron it was personal from the first call. He pushed our daughter to find her own voice, and it showed.
Every email, every draft, every late-night question went straight to Ron. That kind of attention is the reason my application stood out. I will never forget it.

testimonials.note: Placeholder testimonials shown for layout. Replace with real, anonymized quotes before launch.

services.title: Choose the right level for your child.
services.sub: Every family works one-on-one with Ron, wherever they are in the world. No templates. Each plan is built around who your child actually is, and the earlier you start, the more there is to work with.
services.priceNote: Transparent pricing, no inquiry required. Most families start with a free consultation to find the right fit.
services.alacarteSub: Individual services, no package required. All essays remain student-written; Ron coaches and gives feedback only.
services.alacarteNote: Competition support (John Locke, Physics Bowl, AMC/AIME, NYT Student Essay, KSEF) from $150/hour.

packages.name: Kairos Foundation
packages.best: Best for: families whose child is already in senior year and needs the application done right, and done now.
packages.desc: The application is the one part of your child's high school years that cannot be redone. Foundation makes sure it shows them at their best.
features: A personal statement built from who your child really is, developed with Ron from first idea to final draft.
Up to four supplemental essays shaped so each target school reads like their first choice.
A college list reviewed for fit, so your child applies where they can both get in and thrive.
A clear timeline and checklist for the months that decide everything.
Direct email access to Ron between sessions.

packages.name: Kairos Scholar
packages.best: Best for: families starting the summer before senior year who want the whole application handled, end to end.
packages.desc: The complete senior-year partnership. Every part of the application, shaped by Ron personally, so your child stands out for the right reasons.
features: A full school strategy across reach, match, and safety schools.
The personal statement plus unlimited supplemental essays, revised until each one is right.
Their activities positioned to tell one coherent story rather than a list.
A full review of the Common App or Coalition portal before anything is submitted.
Two mock interviews, so your child walks in prepared and calm.
Guidance on financial aid and scholarships, plus a plan for any waitlist or deferral.
Priority access to Ron by email and KakaoTalk.

packages.name: Kairos Prestige
packages.best: Best for: families starting in tenth or eleventh grade who want the profile built, not just the application written.
packages.desc: Everything in Scholar, plus the two years that let Ron shape the transcript, activities, and testing admissions officers look at first.
features: Everything in Kairos Scholar.
Course and academic planning for tenth and eleventh grade.
Extracurricular strategy and summer program selection that build a distinctive profile.
Positioning for the research, competitions, and leadership that carry real weight.
A standardized testing plan across SAT, ACT, and AP.
A dedicated KakaoTalk channel with Ron.

packages.name: Kairos Legacy
packages.best: Best for: families who want to start in ninth grade and leave nothing to chance.
packages.desc: The full four-year partnership, and the most complete preparation Kairos offers, building the record and intellectual identity the most selective universities reward.
features: Everything in Kairos Prestige.
Ninth-grade onboarding and a long-term plan built around a real vision.
An intellectual identity and passion project rooted in what your child actually cares about.
Introductions to Ron's mentor network.
Two family strategy meetings a year.
Support that continues after the acceptance arrives.

about.name: Ron Kim
about.title: The person who will actually work with your child.
paragraphs: Ron Kim founded Kairos after years inside the admissions industry, including time as a consultant at Crimson Education, one of the largest firms in the world. He learned what the big firms do well. He also saw what they do to families: once you sign, you are often handed to a junior associate, while the person with the real track record stays a name on the website.

Kairos is built to be the opposite. Every session, every essay, every strategy call is Ron himself. He takes on only a small number of families each year, because that is the only way to know a student well enough to help them stand out.

Ron grew up in the international school system in Korea and studied at the University of Illinois. Over his career he has guided students into Harvard, Yale, Columbia, Penn, Dartmouth, Cornell, Duke, Johns Hopkins, and the University of Chicago, and has worked on the counseling side of the desk at international schools.

quote.text: The students I remember are not the ones with the highest test scores. They are the ones who found their real story and had the courage to tell it.

about.reassure: At Kairos, your child will never be handed to someone else. The strategy, the feedback, the calls: that is Ron, every time.

items.q: How is Kairos different from a big firm like Crimson?
items.a: At a large firm, after you sign, your child is usually assigned to a junior associate while the senior names stay in the marketing. At Kairos, every session is with Ron, who spent time inside one of those firms and built Kairos to fix exactly this. You get the person with the track record, every time.

items.q: Will Ron write my child's essays?
items.a: No. Every word stays your child's. Ron coaches and refines, but ghostwritten essays are both detectable and a risk to your child. Our results come from authentic work.

Grade 9 for Legacy, Grade 10 for Prestige, Grade 11 for Scholar. Foundation is for seniors who need focused help with the application itself. Earlier gives Ron more to work with, but it is rarely too late.

items.q: Do you work with families outside Korea?
items.a: Yes. Current and past families are in Korea, Thailand, Singapore, Ethiopia, Jordan, and the US. Every session is on Zoom, so time zone is never a problem.

items.q: What does a session look like?
items.a: Sixty minutes on Zoom, focused on whatever matters most that week: an essay draft, the school list, interview prep, or how your child is spending their time. Your child comes with something to work on, and Ron comes prepared.

contact.title: Start with a free consultation.
contact.sub: The first consultation is free and there is no obligation. Ron will talk through your child's goals, where they stand today, and whether Kairos is the right fit. No pressure and no scripted pitch, just an honest conversation. Bring your child if you would like them on the call.
contact.location: Seoul, Korea · working with families across 10+ countries
contact.formNote: We reply within 24 hours. Your details stay private and are never shared.

steps.title: Get an honest assessment
steps.desc: An honest read on where things stand today, and what genuinely sets the student apart.

steps.title: Talk through your goals
steps.desc: The student's strengths, their target schools or programs, and what it will take to get there.

steps.title: See how Kairos works
steps.desc: The personalized roadmap we would build together, and exactly how working with Ron unfolds.

steps.title: Leave with a clear plan
steps.desc: Clear next steps and the right level of support for your family — and the space to decide in your own time.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your child and your goals

footer.tagline: Boutique college admissions consulting. One student, one counselor, in the US and in Korea.
footer.disc: Kairos Education is an independent consultancy and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any university or institution named on this site. Results vary by student and depend on starting point, timeline, target schools, and individual effort. Past admissions outcomes do not guarantee future results.

sticky.msg: Your child's one shot deserves the right counselor.The first consultation is free, with no obligation.
